text:
These tables can help to fix the time of birth within three
to five minutes alone.
(4) They do not determine the sex of the native. Possibly we
have to amend the principle given in Uttara Kalamrita

Day - Constellation Complex 67
by a forward and also by a backward movement. Other
wise for ninety vighatis there can be no female birth. We
tentatively offer the following.
Vighatis Sex
0-15; 121-135; Male
16-30; 106-120; 136-150 Female
31-45; 91-105; 151-165; 211-225 Male
46-60; 76-90; 166-180; 196-210 Female
61-75; 181-195. Male
These and other allied matters will be taken up in the next
chapter and in the last one.

4
N adi Rectification
The Nadi texts give the birth time in ghatis and vighatis. A
careful scrutiny of the texts gives some clues to rectify the
time of birth. The method followed by the Nadi texts that on
any day the five elements(Bhutas, Tattvas) follow one another
in a regular sequence. The sex of the person is determined by
the element ruling at that time.
